title: Batch Comment/Update on tasks
excerpt: I’d like to be able to select multiple items/tasks and type the same update for all of them. A lot of times our items are being processed in groups or are a part of the same larger project and I want to be able to add th…

posts.author: btyrell21 (Breanna Tyrell)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to select multiple items/tasks and type the same update for all of them. A lot of times our items are being processed in groups or are a part of the same larger project and I want to be able to add the same update to each of them without copying and pasting between tasks.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @btyrell21 - this is a great use case. Of course this functionality doesn’t exist as of yet.

As a possible workaround, you could have a Text or Long Text column (lets call it Update) where you could select all the tasks and enter the update at once. Then have an automation run when the “Update” column changes then create it as an update (speech bubble).

image893×310 20.3 KB

A little clunky but is works.

Hope this helps,
Mark
